name: RuleTester reports an invalid case as failing when the detector does not fire (false-negative on invalid code)
command:
mkdir -p tests/my-rule/invalid && printf 'eval("bad")
' > tests/my-rule/invalid/a.ts && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
exit 0
' > stub.sh && chmod +x stub.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/test-rule.sh" my-rule --tests-dir tests --detector stub.sh 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'FAIL rule=my-rule case=invalid/a.ts' err.txt && echo failed 1>&2
